_comments.llm_models_path: Relative path from ComfyUI models folder (e.g., 'LLM'). Used for Python file scanning.
_comments.llm_models_absolute_path: REQUIRED FOR DOCKER: Full absolute path to LLM models folder. Docker containers need the complete path for volume mounts.
_comments.retry_download_attempts: Number of times to retry download if hash verification fails (0 to disable auto-retry)
_comments.hf_token: Optional HuggingFace token for faster downloads. Get one at huggingface.co/settings/tokens. Leave empty to skip.
